Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Navigator]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 4''' — Navigators possess ships.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 10''' — Navigators protect their secrets more closely than the Champions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 10''' — A Navigator came down with Naberius and Tristania.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 17''' — Navigators go on officially sanctioned missions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 25''' — The Navigator walks toward the group wearing an Awakened sword and the Emperor's crown.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 5''' — Navigators are capable of steering ships and finding destinations.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 9''' — Navigators carry personal instructions from the Emperor and possess the Imperial Seal.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 10''' — Meia is a Navigator.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 10''' — Calder is a Navigator.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 12''' — Navigators can be booked for trips.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 24''' — The Navigator questioned a plan as stupid.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
